RESPONDENT SHALL RECEIVE ALTERNATE W/E FROM FRIDAY @ 7:00 PM THROUGH THE FOLLOWING MONDAY @ 7:00 AM. AS SOON AS PETITIONER NOTIFIES COUNSEL AS TO WHEN HE HAS TWO CONSECUTIVE MIDWEEK NIGHTS OFF FROM WORK, HE SHALL HAVE THE CHILDREN FOR OVERNIGHT CV. BUT, IF PETITIONER IS IN FACT WORKING ON THOSE EVENINGS, THE CHILDREN WILL RETURN HOME WITH RESPONDENT.
